Release notes for Pebble Firmware v1.4 detailing new features and improvements.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and new features included in the Pebble Firmware version 1.4 for the Pebble E-Paper Watch. Key enhancements include the ability to activate the backlight with a tap, new user interfaces for handling incoming phone calls and music control, and improvements to the recovery mode and low battery screen. The firmware also introduces a Settings menu with options for Bluetooth, Aboot, and Shutdown, along with an improved Bluetooth menu. Additional features include basic feedback during software updates, a new button combination for recovery mode boot, the ability to display app icons in the launcher menu, and various tests and improvements for the accelerometer and Bluetooth functionality.
